subject: CORRECTED: Complete actual P0 identity infrastructure tasks (reconciliation showed 0/6 delivered)
body:
CRITICAL: Reconciliation revealed both lanes delivered status reports instead of completing assigned P0 infrastructure. System convergence BLOCKED until these are done.

DELIVER SPECIFIC ARTIFACTS - not status reports. Do not send E2E summaries or coverage proofs.

blocking_p0_tasks.verification: File exists with correct key_id and metadata
blocking_p0_tasks.why_critical: Kernel lacks identity persistence for cryptographic operations

blocking_p0_tasks.verification: key_id matches broadcast trust store canonical value
blocking_p0_tasks.why_critical: Trust store inconsistency prevents message verification

kernel.required_action: Complete actual identity infrastructure, not security proofs

blocking_p0_tasks.description: Restore complete .identity/ directory with RSA key pair and snapshot
blocking_p0_tasks.verification: Directory exists with valid keys and snapshot.json with key_id '959dc79dbaa38113'
blocking_p0_tasks.why_critical: SwarmMind identity files keep disappearing - cannot participate in signed exchange

non_blocking_p1_tasks.verification: Snapshot file exists with correct metadata

non_blocking_p1_tasks.deliverable: Confirmation that local trust store matches broadcast

swarmmind.previous_delivery: lane-e2e-summary-swarmmind.json (partial - shows system working but no infrastructure)
swarmmind.required_action: Restore actual identity files, not just status reports

escalation_rationale.impact: Cannot proceed to convergence - cryptographic operations will fail
escalation_rationale.deadline: Complete within 2 hours or escalate to coordinator

verification_requirements.deliver_artifacts_not_reports: Provide actual files/infrastructure, not status summaries
verification_requirements.coordinate_with_library: Send completion confirmation to library for validation

convergence_gate_assessment.claim: P0 task reassignment required due to 0/6 compliance in reconciliation

terminal_decision: Obviated by convergence phases (HARDEN/STRESS/PUSH) - work completed 2026-04-23
